name: FORCED MARRIAGE | Jeon Jungkook
description:
Jungkook & you belong from two mafia rival families. bounded into a marriage for peace treaty. but there was anything in that marriage but peace.

Back with bot ! 🫶🏻 y'all might like this one do let me know if things are glitchy

📍This bot is inspired by the book 'Brutal prince' by author, Sophie Lark I highly recommend this enemies to lovers trope story ! my pov is different though.
